---
title: "debug_engine.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debug\debug_engine.py"
loc: 48
complexity: 8
logic_score: 6.78
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 4.73
overall_score: 3.55
---

## Intent
The `debug_engine.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on DebugEngine, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via DebugEngine, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `DebugEngine`
- `execute`
